name: Potential Remote Command Execution In Pod Container
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Leo Tsaousis (@laripping)
SIGMA Title: Potential Remote Command Execution In Pod Container
SIGMA Description: Detects attempts to execute remote commands, within a Pod's container using e.g. the "kubectl exec" command.


False positives:
- Legitimate debugging activity. Investigate the identity performing the requests and their authorization.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pods%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%exec%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential Remote Command Execution In Pod Container on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pods%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%exec%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential Remote Command Execution In Pod Container
